_comment: Versioned Keycloak realm for MacTranscribe paid tier. Import-ready, NOT auto-applied to production. Import with: kcadm.sh create realms -f mactranscribe-realm.json  (or the Keycloak admin UI > Create realm > import). Set the CHANGE_ME secret and grant the billing service account 'manage-users' before going live.

realm.name: free
realm.description: Free tier (default for every new signup)

realm.name: pro
realm.description: Paid Pro tier — set by the billing webhook on successful Stripe/PayPal payment

clients.name: MacTranscribe desktop app
clients.description: Public PKCE client the macOS app authenticates with.

clients.name: Billing webhook service
clients.description: Confidential service-account client. Grant it the 'manage-users' realm-management role so it can assign the 'pro' role after a payment. Set the secret below before import.
